languages.text: {n}Полковник хмурится, а затем коротко кивает.{/n} "Будет исполнено, Ваша Светлость. Сказали поладить, значит так и сделаем. Не буду мешать".
{n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник хмурится, а затем коротко кивает.{/n} "Будет исполнено, Ваша Светлость. Сказали поладить, значит так и сделаем. Не буду мешать".

traits.locale_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then gives a short nod.{/n} "It shall be done, Your Lordship. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."
{n}The colonel frowns, then gives a short nod.{/n} "It shall be done, Your Lordship. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."
{n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."
{n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel runzelt die Stirn, nickt aber schließlich.{/n} "Wird gemacht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ihr wollt, dass wir miteinander auskommen, und das werden wir. Ich werde mich nicht einmischen."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel runzelt die Stirn, nickt aber schließlich.{/n} "Wird gemacht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ihr wollt, dass wir miteinander auskommen, und das werden wir. Ich werde mich nicht einmischen."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel fronce les sourcils, avant d'acquiescer :{/n} « Comptez sur moi, Votre Seigneurie. Vous souhaitez nous voir nous entendre, et ce sera fait. Je vais vous laisser tranquilles. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel fronce les sourcils, avant d'acquiescer :{/n} « Comptez sur moi, Votre Seigneurie. Vous souhaitez nous voir nous entendre, et ce sera fait. Je vais vous laisser tranquilles. »

languages.text: {n}El coronel frunce el ceño y asiente brevemente.{/n} «Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Ha pedido que nos llevemos bien y eso haremos. No me interpondré».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel frunce el ceño y asiente brevemente.{/n} «Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Ha pedido que nos llevemos bien y eso haremos. No me interpondré».

languages.text: {n}Albay kaşlarını çatıyor, ardından hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. İyi anlaşmamızı söylediniz, biz de öyle yapacağız. Araya girmeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay kaşlarını çatıyor, ardından hafifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Emredersiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. İyi anlaşmamızı söylediniz, biz de öyle yapacağız. Araya girmeyeceğim."

languages.text: {n}上校皱起眉头，随即微微颔首。{/n}“遵命，舰长大人。既然您说要好好相处，那我们就照办。我不打扰了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校皱起眉头，随即微微颔首。{/n}“遵命，舰长大人。既然您说要好好相处，那我们就照办。我不打扰了。”

languages.text: {n}大佐は眉をひそめ、そして少し首を振った。{/n}「承知いたしました、御{mf|殿|女}様。仲良くするようにと言われたので、仲良くいたします。お邪魔はいたしません。」
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel frowns, then nods slightly.{/n} "It shall be done, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. You said to get along, so we shall. I shall not intrude."

traits.locale_text: {n}大佐は眉をひそめ、そして少し首を振った。{/n}「承知いたしました、御{mf|殿|女}様。仲良くするようにと言われたので、仲良くいたします。お邪魔はいたしません。」
